name: Ezagoo Ltd
summary: PART I Business Overview Ezagoo Limited, a Nevada corporation (the Company) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on May 9, 2018. Beijing Ezagoo Zhicheng Internet Technology Limited (BEZL) is the Company through which we operate, and which generates revenue from providing advertising services on Xindian application platform, that is developed and operates by the Company (advertisement income) since January 2022 to April 2023, providing e-commerce trading of goods and products on...
